description: Product Description DENTIPLUS BREATH FRESH COOLMINT SPRAY 25ML Ingredients Alcohol, aqua, aroma, saccharin, 0.1 percent cetylpyridinium chloride, (active ingredient). Directions Spray directly into your mouth. Safety Warning Flammable. Do not spray near eyes. Do not expose to naked flames. Protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 degree c. Keep out of reach of children. Box Contains 1 x Dentiplus Breath Fresh Spray 25 ml See more
